hero.caption: JUNIOR FULL STACK DEVELOPER
hero.intro: Crafting immersive digital experiences through modern frontend development, interactive design, and motion-driven interfaces.
hero.tagline: Crafting immersive digital experiences through modern frontend development, interactive design, and motion-driven interfaces.

about.label: About Me
about.who_i_am_desc: Hello, my name is JJ. I am currently studying Backend Development and working toward becoming a Full Stack Developer. I have a foundation in Frontend Development, UI/UX, and Web Application Development, with hands-on experience building projects using Next.js, React, and TypeScript.
about.interest_desc: I am interested in building web applications, especially with Next.js and TypeScript. I also enjoy Robotics and IoT.
about.education_desc:
King Mongkut's University of Technology North Bangkok, Prachinburi Campus (2nd Year)
Bachelor of Industrial Technology in Information Technology (Continuing Program)
about.goals_desc: My short-term goal is to become a Frontend Developer first. For the long-term, I want to grow into a Full Stack Developer who can build products from end to end, and use my knowledge of IoT to create useful things.

description: Developed UI and game systems for 7 mini-games with 9 levels each (63 levels total)
Designed for a target audience of children aged 5–7 years old
Built animation systems and game logic for all mini-games
Freelance development of an IoT equipment borrowing & returning web application
Developed both Frontend and Backend, covering equipment and user management systems
Designed the database schema and UI from scratch to deployment
Developed an ESP32 robot controlled via mobile phone, including movement and gripping commands
Taught and demonstrated robot usage to students
Collaborated on developing a National ID card reader application
